textByHash.1ccb29d358d04603289e7702a7576b1447b96bf9: Psst! Got any Void kit you don't want? Spare robes, spare helms, that kind of thing?
textByHash.ade19f89485e2768debba78e67f551e0cb234143: Might be able to take it off your hands for you. Show me what you've got, and I'll see if I can get you some Commendation Points for it.
textByHash.4a26e12b817f376689c669b785144768757e91f7: Just so you know, you've got a lot of Commendation points already, so I can't pay you my usual rate.
textByHash.c4626507a396f458e2c0d8481ddfeb77d6584ebd: That's not really the sort of stuff I want
